template.name: ingest_batch_header_allocation
template.description:
When an allocation file is received, the file total is posted to the permanent Clearing Total and a per-file Allocation Clearing account.

The Allocation Clearing per-file (10104) credit balance represents the expected total for this file. Detail lines (T5106) draw it down to zero. If the balance is non-zero after all detail lines are loaded, the file is incomplete.

**Accounts involved:**
- 10101 Clearing Total -- permanent accumulator, debit balance grows with each file
- 10104 Allocation Clearing per-file -- per-file instance, credit balance zeroes when all detail lines load

financial_statements_impact.description: Asset-to-asset reclassification within Master FBO house accounts: Clearing Total (10101) debit balance increases while Allocation Clearing per-file (10104) credit balance increases equally. Total economic ledger assets unchanged.

template.trigger: Allocation file arrives and passes validation. Fires once per file before detail lines (T5106).

ledger_scope_descriptions.economic_ledger: Economic ledger (ID 5001) where the batch header establishes the per-file allocation clearing balance.

accounting_treatments.description: Establish the per-file allocation clearing balance by transferring the file total from the permanent Clearing Total to a per-file Allocation Clearing instance; no P&L impact.

account_code_validations.description: Permanent accumulator account (Master FBO - Clearing Total) on the economic ledger; debited once per allocation file for the file total.
Per-file allocation clearing instance (Master FBO - Allocation Clearing) on the economic ledger; credited with the file total, then drawn down to zero by detail line events (T5106).

allocation_file_id.description: Allocation file reference used to create/select the per-file Allocation Clearing (10104) instance.

expected_line_count.description: Number of consumer line items expected in this allocation file, for monitoring and reconciliation.

statement_file_id.description: Bank statement file reference linking this allocation file to the corresponding bank statement.

variables.description: Static: Master FBO - Clearing Total (10101) -- single permanent accumulator, always the same.
variables.name: clearing_total

legs.description: Reserve the file total so detail lines can draw it down individually; a non-zero balance after all lines load flags an incomplete file.

examples.name: batch_header_10k
examples.description: Batch header for a $10,000.00 allocation file (alloc-2026-02-23-001) with 2 expected line items ($8k Customer A + $2k Customer B).
